name: Gizmek Kaku, the Supreme Shining Sky Stag
name_jp: <ruby lang="jp"><rb>機</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>き</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>巧</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>こう</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby><ruby lang="jp"><rb>蹄</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>てい</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>－<ruby lang="jp"><rb>天迦久御雷</rb><rp> (</rp><rt>アメノカクノミカヅチ</rt><rp>)</rp></ruby>
name_jp_rom: Kikōtei - Ame no Kaku no Mikazuchi
desc: If a monster is in the Extra Monster Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster in the Extra Monster Zone; equip that face-up monster to this card (max. 1). When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon 1 of your Monster Cards equipped to this card. You can only use each effect of "Gizmek Kaku, the Supreme Shining Sky Stag" once per turn.
mnst_eff: If a monster is in the Extra Monster Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster in the Extra Monster Zone; equip that face-up monster to this card (max. 1). When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon 1 of your Monster Cards equipped to this card. You can only use each effect of "Gizmek Kaku, the Supreme Shining Sky Stag" once per turn.
eff: If a monster is in the Extra Monster Zone: You can Special Summon this card from your hand. You can target 1 face-up monster in the Extra Monster Zone; equip that face-up monster to this card (max. 1). When this card destroys an opponent's monster by battle: You can Special Summon 1 of your Monster Cards equipped to this card. You can only use each effect of "Gizmek Kaku, the Supreme Shining Sky Stag" once per turn.

action: Equips monsters from the player's field to itself
Equips monsters from the opponent's field to itself
Activates if it destroys a monster by battle
summoning: Special Summons itself from your hand
Special Summons from your Spell & Trap Zone
